title: Tax offset questions T1-T2
description: How to complete the tax offset questions T1 and T2 in your paper tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, tax return, 2024, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

child_links.title: T1 Seniors and pensioners tax offset 2024
child_links.description: Complete this question if you meet the conditions to claim the seniors and pensioners tax offset.

child_links.title: T2 Australian superannuation income stream 2024
child_links.description: Complete this question to help you work out if you're eligible for this tax offset and the amount you can claim.

child_links.title: Tax offsets in your supplementary tax return 2024
child_links.description: Complete question T if you had tax offsets in the supplementary section in your tax return.

child_links.title: Total tax offsets 2024
child_links.description: Complete this question to work out the total tax offsets in your tax return.
